versions.version_description: This tab shows the strum pattern and chord note changes.
Different chords, added palm muting and chords that are only played once, also added the intro.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
* The guitar cuts out in certain areas, chords marked with a (*) are the basic synth chords


[Intro]

[ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Cmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Fmaj7[/ch]  [ch]Fm[/ch]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]*                   [ch]F[/ch]*
   We couldn't turn around[/tab]
[tab]                    [ch]C[/ch]*
'Til we were upside down[/tab]

We do this every time
